text: replied haha to a message that said my grandma passed away. autocorrect has ruined my life
by 2030 well need a subscription to open our own fridge
we're like a family here is corporate for we will guilt trip you into working weekends
i meal prepped 5 containers of chicken and rice then ordered doordash every single day this week
my therapist and i have the same therapist. small world
told my boss i had a doctors appointment but i was actually sitting in my car crying at a wendys
the gym is just adults paying to do chores they invented
my kid asked alexa where babies come from before i could stop him. alexa did not hold back
dating in your 30s is just two people googling each others medication side effects
if your landlord texts you happy birthday thats a threat
i have mass emailed the wrong attachment so many times i should be in prison
my retirement plan is hoping scientists discover immortality before i turn 65
got a raise that didnt even cover the increase in my health insurance premium lmaooo
the fbi agent watching my search history deserves hazard pay
i flush the toilet with my foot in my own house. trust no one not even yourself
told my date i was a crypto investor. i have 11 dollars in dogecoin
whoever designed open office floor plans has never had a coworker who eats tuna at 9am
my 4 year old told a stranger nice belly and i have never apologized faster
i put on gym clothes to feel productive then laid on the couch for 6 hours
every linkedin post is just a guy who got fired writing a novel about his journey
my plant died and honestly i saw it as a sign to not have kids
they put a tv in the gas pump now. capitalism will not rest until every surface is an ad
i said i love you to my uber driver when i got out. we both pretended it didnt happen
my coworker microwaves fish every friday and i am convinced its a form of warfare
if water is free why am i paying 47 dollars for it at the airport
told my kid the ice cream truck only plays music when theyre out of ice cream. parenting is lying
i have been on hold with insurance for so long i developed a parasocial relationship with the hold music
my screen time report just called me a disappointment in 14 languages
accidentally liked my exs photo from 2019 at 2am. time to fake my own death i guess
the government is putting wifi in the birds and nobody wants to talk about it
job listing said entry level then required 8 years experience and a phd in suffering
i set 14 alarms and still woke up to the 15th one. my body is in open rebellion
my dentist asked if i floss and i lied to a medical professional without hesitation
normalize canceling plans because your couch made a compelling counter offer
my landlord raised rent and said the neighborhood is improving. the improvement is a new liquor store
walked into a glass door at work and three people saw. applying to new jobs as we speak
every recipe blog is 3000 words about grandmas farm before telling you to boil water
my son asked me what taxes are and honestly i started crying a little
imagine being a horse and someone puts a tiny man on you and hes hitting you with a stick. id be furious
i use dry shampoo like its a personality trait at this point
my credit score and my age are in a race to see which one is lower
got ghosted by someone whose bio said they value communication. poetry
the self checkout machine accused me of stealing and there were 20 witnesses. i was just slow
i keep a folder of resignation letters i never send. its my emotional support documents
my 3 year old asked the mailman if he lives here now. i have never been more embarrassed
alexa heard me argue with myself and asked if i wanted to add anything to my shopping list
if you microwave fish at work you deserve whatever happens to you in the afterlife
i bring my own bags to the grocery store and act like i saved the ocean
every email i send starts with hope this finds you well knowing full well nothing finds anyone well
the moon landing was real but the moon isnt. think about it
my kid drew a picture of our family and gave me no neck. i will be processing this for years
i have trust issues because of a group project in 2009
they should make a dating app that matches you based on what time you go to bed
my coworker cc'd my boss on a reply all and i have never felt more betrayed in peacetime
my fitbit counted me making a sandwich as exercise. the bar is underground
i told my toddler no and she looked at me like i just abolished democracy
just realized ive been saying supposably instead of supposedly for 30 years. who let me do this
rent is due student loans are due car payment is due. nothing is free except audacity
my uber rating is 4.2 and i genuinely want to know what i did
i eat salad for lunch and then reward myself with an entire pizza for dinner
the ceo sent a company wide email saying were all in this together from his yacht
every time i open my banking app i age 5 years
my cat stares at the wall for hours and honestly i get it. i too see nothing ahead
they should teach taxes in school instead of whatever the mitochondria is doing
told my doctor i exercise regularly. i walk to the fridge does that count
just found out my coworker makes 20k more than me for the same job. smiling in a unhinged way
my kid said daddy why are you always tired and i almost showed him the mortgage statement
i googled is it normal to and google finished that sentence in 40 horrifying ways
the birds outside my window at 5am are not singing they are screaming and i relate
i put my out of office on and felt more freedom than any vacation has ever given me
normalize telling people their baby looks like a ceo of a fortune 500 company instead of cute
fluoride is just the governments way of making us too calm to revolt. open your eyes
i have been saying ill start monday for 14 consecutive mondays
my daughter asked siri if im a good mom and siri said heres what i found on the web
every meeting that couldve been an email is a small crime against humanity
bought a self help book and never opened it. thats a metaphor for something
my roommate eats my leftovers and says he didnt know they were mine. they had my name on them
i cried in the work bathroom twice today and still said im fine in standup
the check engine light has been on for 8 months. we're in a committed relationship now
dating apps should have a filter for people who actually respond to messages
my son told his teacher our family secret which is that i eat cereal for dinner. we are ruined
i pretend to stretch before running so people think i run regularly. i do not
the password requirements for my bank are harder than getting into the bank itself
my kid asked why we cant just print more money and honestly she has a point
i brought a reusable straw to a restaurant then drove home in a truck that gets 12 mpg
every time someone says lets circle back i lose a year off my life
my horoscope said big changes coming and then my rent went up. thanks stars
i sleep with socks on and honestly that should be listed as a red flag on dating apps
the 5 second rule is actually the 5 minute rule when nobody is watching
nothing humbles you faster than seeing yourself on someone elses phone camera
my wifi went out and i just sat there like a victorian child waiting for the plague to pass
just sneezed so hard my back went out. this is what aging is. random injuries from existing
the grocery store self checkout is just me working a shift i didnt sign up for
i always say im 5 minutes away when i havent even found my keys yet
they want us back in office for the culture. the culture is passive aggression and burnt coffee
my toddler handed me a toy phone and said its your boss and i felt genuine fear
the pigeons in this city walk like they pay rent. zero fear. absolute menaces
i brought lunch from home and still spent 15 dollars at the vending machine
my neighbor has a ring camera pointed at my door and waves at me through it. dystopia is here
someone at work said lets take this offline and i have never felt more threatened
